localyze.settings.parallax_hint: Pans wide images horizontally with mouse or tilt on narrow screens
localyze.settings.profile_hint: Each AI call uses its own prompt template and connection profile. Leave connection blank to use the chat's active API.
localyze.settings.step1.title: Step 1 — Location Changed? (Boolean)
localyze.settings.step1.guidance: This gate runs on every AI message. To keep the chat fast and cheap, use a lightweight model. Mistral Small 2603 is the recommended choice for this high-frequency task.
localyze.settings.step2.title: Step 2 — Which Location? (Classifier)
localyze.settings.step2.guidance: This step requires higher descriptive intelligence. Weaker models can produce chaotic results or fail to follow the extraction format. Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview is recommended for its balance of power and reliability.
localyze.settings.step3.title: Step 3 — Describe New Location
localyze.settings.step3.guidance: This step requires higher descriptive intelligence. Weaker models can produce chaotic results or fail to follow the extraction format. Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview is recommended for its balance of power and reliability.
localyze.settings.step4.title: Step 4 — Targeted Discovery
localyze.settings.step4.guidance: This step requires higher descriptive intelligence. Weaker models can produce chaotic results or fail to follow the extraction format. Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview is recommended for its balance of power and reliability.
localyze.settings.image_gen_hint: Images are generated via Pollinations. Enter your API key to securely save it to your server vault.
localyze.settings.dev_mode_hint: Generates 320×180 preview images to save credits
localyze.settings.maintenance_hint: Scan for background images no longer referenced by any location.
localyze.workshop.title: Location Workshop
localyze.workshop.library_hint: Browse discovered locations and select one to apply to the current scene.
localyze.workshop.library_empty: Library is empty. Use "Explorer" to discover new places.
localyze.workshop.architect_empty: Select a location from the Library or use the Explorer to start refining.
localyze.workshop.explorer_hint: Analyze the recent turns of the conversation to identify a new location. You can provide keywords to guide the AI's imagination.
localyze.add_modal.title: Add Location to Library
localyze.edit_modal.title: Edit Location:
localyze.edit_modal.check_update_bg_titl: If checked, the background will be overwritten with a new generation on save.
localyze.picker.title: Location Library
localyze.picker.empty_library: Library is empty. Use "Explorer" to discover new places.
localyze.picker.detect_hint: Analyze the current context to discover a new location automatically.
localyze.orphan.title: Orphaned Localyze Images
localyze.orphan.hint: These files belong to sessions not found in any known chat.
localyze.prompt_modal.placeholder_hint: Use {{placeholders}} as shown in the default prompt.
localyze.toolbar.title: Localyze
localyze.toolbar.label: Localyze
